members.name: _CreateMeshArray
members.summary: Override this method to customize how this primitive mesh should be generated. Should return an [Array] where each element is another Array of values required for the mesh (see the [enum Mesh.ArrayType] constants).

members.name: GetMeshArrays
members.summary: Returns the mesh arrays used to make up the surface of this primitive mesh. [b]Example:[/b] Pass the result to [method ArrayMesh.add_surface_from_arrays] to create a new surface: [codeblocks] [gdscript] var c = CylinderMesh.new() var arr_mesh = ArrayMesh.new() arr_mesh.add_surface_from_arrays(Mesh.PRIMITIVE_TRIANGLES, c.get_mesh_arrays()) [/gdscript] [csharp] var c = new CylinderMesh(); var arrMesh = new ArrayMesh(); arrMesh.AddSurfaceFromArrays(Mesh.PrimitiveType.Triangles, c.GetMeshArrays()); [/csharp] [/codeblocks]

members.name: RequestUpdate
members.summary: Request an update of this primitive mesh based on its properties.

members.name: AddUv2
members.summary: If set, generates UV2 UV coordinates applying a padding using the [member uv2_padding] setting. UV2 is needed for lightmapping.

members.name: CustomAabb
members.summary: Overrides the [AABB] with one defined by user for use with frustum culling. Especially useful to avoid unexpected culling when using a shader to offset vertices.

members.name: FlipFaces
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the order of the vertices in each triangle is reversed, resulting in the backside of the mesh being drawn. This gives the same result as using [constant BaseMaterial3D.CULL_FRONT] in [member BaseMaterial3D.cull_mode].

members.name: Material
members.summary: The current [Material] of the primitive mesh.

members.name: Uv2Padding
members.summary: If [member add_uv2] is set, specifies the padding in pixels applied along seams of the mesh. Lower padding values allow making better use of the lightmap texture (resulting in higher texel density), but may introduce visible lightmap bleeding along edges. If the size of the lightmap texture can't be determined when generating the mesh, UV2 is calculated assuming a texture size of 1024x1024.

virtualMethods.name: _CreateMeshArray
virtualMethods.summary: Override this method to customize how this primitive mesh should be generated. Should return an [Array] where each element is another Array of values required for the mesh (see the [enum Mesh.ArrayType] constants).
